reference: My elderly father is experiencing excruciating back spasms. He has been moving between a chair and a bed for the past week due to illness. His illness is better, but his back is much worse. I am using ice, a lidocaine patch every twelve hours, and arthritis-strength acetaminophen as directed. Any suggestions other than the emergency room?
text: My elderly father is experiencing excruciating back spasms. He has been moving between a chair and a bed for the past week due to illness. His illness is better, but his back is much worse. I am losing ice, a lidocaine patch every 12 hours, and arthritis-strength acetaminophen is directed. Any suggestions other than the emergency room?
